title: Bastelgruppen Client
description: A vanilla like client to play with your friends. Focusing on performance and small visual improvements.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b61c5bfa0d4287263a4ee32697ab51597874c1.png)

A **vanilla like** client to play with your friends!

The pack focuses on **quality of life features and visual improvements**
It is perfect if you are looking for a vanilla playthrough with an **enhanced look** and **no additional gameplay-content**.

If your or your friends computer cant handle this pack, maybe try the light variant [Bastelgruppen Client Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bastelgruppen-client-optimized)

## Mods
<details>
<summary>Mods Version 1.4.3 (Minecraft 1.21.10)</summary>

### Quality of Life
- Better Advancements
- Better Mount HUD
- Better Statistics Screen
- Boat Item View
- Cherished Worlds
- Client Sort
- Controlling
- Cubes Without Borders
- ~~Equipment Compare~~
- ~~Essential Mod~~
- Fast IP Ping
- Fast Trading
- Freecam
- GUI Followers
- Held Item Info
- Horse Statistics
- Lighty
- MidnightControls
- Mod Menu
- Monsters in the Closet
- Mouse Tweaks
- Numeral Ping
- Pick Up Notifier
- Scribble
- Scrollable Tooltips
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Spyglass Improvements
- Stack to Nearby Chests
- Trade Cycling
- Visual Trades
- Visual Keys
- World Play Time

### Visual Improvements
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Features
- AppleSkin
- Better Clouds
- Better Snow Coverage
- Blur+
- Chat Heads
- Continuity
- Detail Armor Bar Reconstruted
- Dyed
- EnhancedVisuals
- Fancy Toast | Better Advancements
- Iris Shaders
- LambDynamicLights
- Locator Heads
- No Resource Pack Warnings
- Not Enough Animations
- Particle Effects
- Particle Rain
- Particular ✨ Reforged
- Polytone
- Spyglass Astronomy
- Status Effect Bars
- Visuality
- Wakes
- YDM's Weapon Master

### Sound Improvements
- ImmersiveThunder
- Presence Footsteps
- Sound Physics Remastered
  
### Performance Improvments
- BadOptimizations
- Chunky
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- ImmediatelyFast
- Krypton
- Lithium
- More Culling
- ScalableLux
- Sodium

strikethrough means not updated yet
</details>
